title: Prima Laundry 3 Fold Dryer Airer Rack Washing Home Garment Clothes Stand, Metal, White, 6 Metres
features: Versatile Indoor and Outdoor Use: Ideal for drying clothes both indoors and outdoors, providing flexibility regardless of the weather conditions.
Generous Drying Space: Offers 6 metres of drying space, ample for multiple garments, towels, and linens, making laundry day more efficient.
Compact and Foldable: Folds down to just 51 cm (W) x 110 cm (H) for easy storage, perfect for homes with limited space.
Durable White Coated Finish: Features a sleek, non-toxic white coating that ensures safety for all fabrics and long-lasting durability.
Easy Setup and Storage: Effortlessly extends to 155 cm (W) x 110 cm (H) when in use and folds away compactly, simplifying your laundry routine.
description: Introducing our 3-Fold Indoor and Outdoor Folding Clothes Airer, the ultimate drying solution for your laundry needs. Designed for both indoor and outdoor use, this airer combines convenience, durability, and ample drying space in one compact unit. Whether you need a reliable drying rack for your home or a portable solution for travel, our 2-Fold Indoor and Outdoor Folding Clothes Airer is the perfect choice. Enjoy the benefits of air drying your clothes, saving energy, and maintaining the quality of your fabrics. Order yours today and experience the convenience and efficiency of this versatile clothes airer!
